resources.string: Tap + to create your first AI agent
Are you sure you want to delete this agent? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to reset to global defaults? All custom settings will be lost.
Configure Agent tools and MCP servers
Record debug info and error logs
No providers configured yet.\nTap the button above to add one.
Are you sure you want to delete this provider? This action cannot be undone.
This will permanently delete all messages after this point. Continue?
The agent is requesting permission to execute a tool, which may affect system state or incur external costs.
Semantic memory for context across sessions
Extract entities and relationships from conversations
Enable document retrieval for this session
Are you sure you want to delete this session? This action cannot be undone.
Semi: File writes and high-risk tools need approval
AI will only use current conversation context
Manage data security, local export, and cloud sync settings.
Data is stored locally by default. Configure WebDAV for end-to-end encrypted cross-device sync.
Manage and run on-device lightweight models for maximum privacy and low latency.
Required to run downloaded GGUF models
Select a provider and configure the credentials needed for integration.
Are you sure you want to delete all model configurations? Enabled models will become unavailable.
Error: Invalid API Key or insufficient quota
Configure web search behavior and result filtering.
Configure capabilities and external tool connections for your AI agents.
Infinite loop mode enabled. May cause excessive API costs.
Search using the default search engine
Create new custom tools via meta-tool
Generate AI images from text descriptions
Read content from a file in the workspace
Write or update content to a file in the workspace
List contents of a directory in the workspace
Search for content in the workspace files
Compute line-by-line diff between file versions
Apply patch changes to workspace files
Execute JavaScript code in a secure sandbox
Initialize a new structured agent execution plan
Update steps in the current execution plan
Cancel or drop current execution plan
No custom skills yet.\nTap the button below to create your first tool.
No MCP servers yet.\nExtend agent capabilities via Model Context Protocol.
Customize the look and feel of your app.
Global statistics across all providers and models.
No token usage data yet. Start a conversation to see stats.
This will permanently erase all token usage statistics. This action cannot be undone.
Centralized intelligence repository and vector storage.
Upload documents or create a folder to get started.
Memory summaries from sessions will appear here.
This memory vector will be permanently removed.
No graph data yet. Extract knowledge graph from documents to get started.
Upload documents to start building your knowledge base.
Large file detected (%1$s). Editing may affect performance. Consider splitting the document.
This node represents a key entity in the knowledge graph. Tap to expand context or modify its properties.
Knowledge graph extraction, retrieval strategies, and cost management for intelligent context augmentation.
Extract named entities, concepts, and relationships from the following text. Format as JSON with nodes and edges arrays.
Extract entities and relationships from documents
Dynamically build micro-graphs for each query
Automatically detect text category to optimize entity extraction
Use content hashing to skip unchanged documents
Real-time RAG index metrics and diagnostics
Fine-tune global retrieval augmented generation logic for optimal AI performance across operations.
Higher = more precise, lower = more recall
Re-ranks retrieved chunks for better relevance
Output vector dimension (null = model default, e.g. 1536 for text-embedding-3-small)
Max input tokens per API call (affects batch size; 8192 default)
Batch size for rerank API (limited by model, typically 32-100)
This will delete all indexed vector data. Knowledge graph data and original documents will not be affected.
Fine-tune the RAG pipeline parameters to optimize context extraction, relevance filtering, and query execution.
Include conversation memory vectors in search results
Include knowledge base documents in search results
Combine dense vector with sparse BM25 matching
Rewrite user queries for better retrieval accuracy
This will delete all messages in this session. This action cannot be undone.
This will permanently delete this session and all its content.
Are you sure you want to delete this session? This action cannot be undone.
请先点击顶部配置会话模型
